/usr/bin/arm-none-eabi-gcc  -mcpu=cortex-m0 -mthumb -Wall -fdata-sections -ffunction-sections -mcpu=cortex-m0 -mthumb -T "/home/gunnar/CS6780/Project/ECE-5780-Project-GBJCTS/STM32F072XX_FLASH.ld" --specs=nano.specs -Wl,-Map=.map -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--print-memory-usage CMakeFiles/flash_project.dir/Core/Src/system_stm32f0xx.c.obj CMakeFiles/flash_project.dir/Core/Src/syscalls.c.obj CMakeFiles/flash_project.dir/Core/Src/sysmem.c.obj CMakeFiles/flash_project.dir/src/control.c.obj CMakeFiles/flash_project.dir/src/filter.c.obj CMakeFiles/flash_project.dir/src/i2c.c.obj CMakeFiles/flash_project.dir/src/imu.c.obj CMakeFiles/flash_project.dir/src/lidar.c.obj CMakeFiles/flash_project.dir/src/main.c.obj CMakeFiles/flash_project.dir/src/motor.c.obj CMakeFiles/flash_project.dir/src/pwm.c.obj CMakeFiles/flash_project.dir/src/radio.c.obj CMakeFiles/flash_project.dir/src/uart.c.obj CMakeFiles/flash_project.dir/src/stm32f0xx_it.c.obj CMakeFiles/flash_project.dir/src/stm32f0xx_hal_msp.c.obj CMakeFiles/flash_project.dir/startup_stm32f072xb.s.obj CMakeFiles/flash_project.dir/Drivers/STM32F0xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f0xx_hal.c.obj CMakeFiles/flash_project.dir/Drivers/STM32F0xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f0xx_hal_rcc.c.obj CMakeFiles/flash_project.dir/Drivers/STM32F0xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f0xx_hal_gpio.c.obj CMakeFiles/flash_project.dir/Drivers/STM32F0xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f0xx_hal_cortex.c.obj CMakeFiles/flash_project.dir/Drivers/STM32F0xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f0xx_hal_pwr.c.obj CMakeFiles/flash_project.dir/Drivers/STM32F0xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f0xx_hal_pwr_ex.c.obj CMakeFiles/flash_project.dir/Drivers/STM32F0xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f0xx_hal_tim.c.obj CMakeFiles/flash_project.dir/Drivers/STM32F0xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f0xx_hal_tim_ex.c.obj CMakeFiles/flash_project.dir/Drivers/STM32F0xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f0xx_hal_i2c.c.obj CMakeFiles/flash_project.dir/Drivers/STM32F0xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f0xx_hal_uart.c.obj -o flash_project.elf
